pages.text: Field Cascade Alloy is the first intentional bridge: steel + aluminum + copper in the Silent Gear alloy forge. Grade the ingredients first when possible, alloy them, then grade the alloy before making parts.
Use Field Cascade for general heads, redstone-copper conductive alloy for fast mining, rubber/plastic/resin for grips and linings, and cobalt-chrome or stainless for armor pieces that need to last.
